parsed_review.summary: CP00-591 is a descriptor-only RP19.P04.M05 "Permission And Audit Binding" permission slice (risk A, 10 units, RP19.P04.M05.S08-S17, deliverable distribution ui:3/security_audit:2/implementation:3/fixture:1/test:1). Source inspection via Read/Grep/Glob confirms the pack-level claim is honest and bounded: manifest declares production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:"descriptor" — no runtime/enterprise-trust overclaim. The CP591 registry binding, service descriptor/case-set builders, validators (coverage + slice + hermes/claude/handoff), index exports, model.test.js cases, the validate-rp19 script, and the contract's p04_permission_slice_descriptor projection all reconcile exactly: 1 section, 10 descriptor-only rows matching the planned S08-S17 titles, each carrying descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold (synthetic_only, no_real_data, all dispatch/write/persist/leak flags false; deny_over_allow and unauthorized-data-omission asserted at descriptor level). Authority boundary is preserved — claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human approval required for runtime opening deferred to CP00-592. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptors (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. The readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1446-byte valid JSON, non-zero stdout) and the claude_packet enumerates the CP178+ forbidden-evidence blockers. Command-evidence reports all pre-review implementation/plan/repo-wide gates green; the post-review gated artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent at this review stage and produced downstream — the prior closed pack CP00-590 confirms the end-state 5-artifact pattern. No secrets or real client/matter data found in changed source. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues identified; nothing blocks pack or goal closeout. Final enterprise-trust approval remains a human responsibility, not this read-only review.
